who: field service supervisors in construction contractors managing 5–15 OSHA compliance reports/month
offer: For field service supervisors in construction contractors processing 5–15 OSHA compliance reports/month, manual filing causes late submissions and potential fines. We streamline report compilation and filing instead of manual filing and tracking of compliance reports.
problem: Difficulty in compiling and filing OSHA compliance reports accurately and on time.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for field service supervisors
Indie Hackers discussions on compliance workflows
DM outreach to field service supervisors with demo video
Community forums for sharing compliance tools
try_it: Let users try manual report entry and template generation for compliance reports on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
